name: Ooga Booga Battle
short_description: Raise your Ooga Booga Baby for greatness in Ooga Booga Battle, a half virtual pet, half horde defense arcade experience! Train to evolve into a fierce cryptid and take down as many Ooga Booga Baddies as you can! Can you battle with the Ooga Booga Best of 'em?!
detailed_description:
FEED 'EM, RAISE 'EM, BATTLE 'EM! 

ABOUT:

One stormy night, while exploring the woods near your hometown, you stumble upon a strange egg nestled in the underbrush, glowing faintly in the dark. Curiosity gets the better of you, and you bring it home, not knowing what lies inside. The next morning, the egg hatches, and out pops a tiny, mysterious creature—an “Ooga Booga Baby.”

Unsure of where it came from but feeling a bond with the little cryptid, you decide to raise it as your own. You quickly learn that this baby has untapped potential—potential that will only grow with proper care and training. Feed it, train it, and guide it as it evolves into a powerful cryptid, capable of facing the strange and dangerous “Ooga Booga Baddies”. It's up to you to ensure your cryptid grows strong for the battles ahead!

FEATURES: 

  • Train your Ooga Booga Baby in the Raising phase… Then Defeat “Ooga Booga Baddies” in the battle phase! Can you get a high score and scare with the "Ooga Booga Best of 'Em"?

  • Three playable cryptids with unique playstyles to evolve into! Can you see them all? 

  • Online leaderboards!

  • Complete bestiary! 

  • Nostalgic one-bit graphics and chiptune sound! 

  • ...AND MORE!
